controls.title: Container registries must disable the admin account
controls.description: Azure Container Registry must use Microsoft Entra identities instead of the shared admin account.
controls.remediation: Set admin_enabled = false and grant AcrPull or AcrPush roles to managed identities.

controls.title: Container registries must disable anonymous pulls
controls.description: Container images must not be downloadable without authentication.

controls.title: Container registries must disable public network access
controls.description: Container registries must use private connectivity.
controls.remediation: Use Premium SKU, configure a private endpoint, and set public_network_access_enabled = false.

controls.title: Container registries must disable artifact export
controls.description: Registry artifact export must be disabled to reduce data-exfiltration paths.

controls.title: AKS clusters must be private
controls.description: The Kubernetes API server must not be exposed through a public endpoint.
controls.remediation: Set private_cluster_enabled = true and configure private DNS connectivity.

controls.title: AKS clusters must disable local accounts
controls.description: AKS access must use Microsoft Entra authentication instead of static local administrator credentials.

controls.title: AKS clusters must enable Kubernetes RBAC
controls.description: Kubernetes role-based access control must enforce authorization.

controls.title: AKS clusters must enable Azure Policy
controls.description: Azure Policy for Kubernetes must enforce and audit cluster guardrails.

controls.title: AKS clusters should enable workload identity
controls.description: Pods should access Azure resources through federated workload identity.
controls.remediation: Set oidc_issuer_enabled = true and workload_identity_enabled = true.

controls.title: AKS clusters should enable the OIDC issuer
controls.description: The OIDC issuer is required for secure federated workload identities.

controls.title: AKS clusters must disable HTTP application routing
controls.description: The development-focused HTTP application routing add-on must not be used for production ingress.
controls.remediation: Set http_application_routing_enabled = false and deploy an approved ingress solution.

controls.title: AKS clusters should enable image cleanup
controls.description: Unused images should be removed regularly to reduce vulnerable software retained on nodes.

controls.title: Container registries must have tags
controls.description: Container registries must include ownership and governance metadata.
controls.remediation: Add the required organizational tags to the registry.

controls.title: Container registries must use managed identity
controls.description: A managed identity is required for secure access to customer-managed keys and other Azure services.
controls.remediation: Configure a SystemAssigned or UserAssigned identity block.

controls.title: Premium container registries should use customer-managed encryption
controls.description: Customer-managed keys provide control over registry encryption key lifecycle and access.
controls.remediation: Configure registry encryption with a Key Vault key and user-assigned identity.

controls.title: Premium container registries should enable content trust
controls.description: Content trust helps consumers verify signed container images.
controls.remediation: Set trust_policy_enabled = true on a Premium registry.

controls.title: Container registries should send diagnostics to Log Analytics
controls.description: Centralized registry logs support auditing and incident response.
controls.remediation: Create an azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting targeting the registry.
